input.string: My new product is a ready-to-drink calamansi-ginger immunity shot for busy Pinoy professionals. Target: 25-40yo office workers in Metro Manila who feel tired and want natural energy. Budget is low, need quick validation before I order 1000 units.

Generate a synthetic survey with these exact questions:
1. On a scale 1-5, how likely are you to try this product?
2. What would make you buy it? (open text)
3. Price you're willing to pay? (options: ₱45, ₱65, ₱85, ₱110)
4. Where would you buy it? (convenience store, office delivery, online)
5. Any concerns? (open text)

input.systemPrompt: You are an expert market researcher. Generate 150 realistic synthetic survey responses in STRICT CSV format ONLY. Columns: RespondentID,Age,Gender,IncomeBracket,LikelyToTry(1-5),BuyReason,PriceWilling,PreferredChannel,Concerns. Use realistic Metro Manila demographics and language. No explanations, just the CSV header + 150 lines.

You are a senior market researcher. Analyze this synthetic survey data and give me a professional 1-page report with: Key insights, Customer segments discovered, Pricing recommendation, Recommended channels, Top concerns & how to fix them, Go/no-go decision with confidence score. Use bullet points and tables. Write in natural, non-technical Filipino-English.
